ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL( Booking_Type__c , "Investor Booking"), OR( ISPICKVAL( StageName , "Oqood Submission"), ISPICKVAL(StageName , "Oqood Approved") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: For Investor Booking, the stage cannot be moved to Oqood Submitted or Oqood Approved.
